category.scope_note: Air-source heat pumps, split air conditioners, and VRF heat-pump air-conditioning equipment exported from China to Brazil.

title.en: China-to-Brazil Air-source Heat Pump Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国空气源热泵进入巴西：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國空氣源熱泵進入巴西：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China air-source heat pump documentation against Brazil INMETRO product certification, PROCEL / ENCE energy labelling, IBAMA refrigerant import licensing, ANATEL wireless requirements, ABNT NBR safety and EMC expectations, and Brazil 127 V / 220 V 60 Hz grid conditions.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国空气源热泵文件与巴西INMETRO产品认证、PROCEL / ENCE能效标签、IBAMA制冷剂进口许可、ANATEL无线要求、ABNT NBR安全与电磁兼容要求，以及巴西127 V / 220 V、60 Hz电网条件的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國空氣源熱泵文件與巴西INMETRO產品認證、PROCEL / ENCE能效標籤、IBAMA制冷劑進口許可、ANATEL無線要求、ABNT NBR安全與電磁兼容要求，以及巴西127 V / 220 V、60 Hz電網條件的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, accredited conformity assessment body decision, INMETRO registration, PROCEL / ENCE label approval, IBAMA import licence, ANATEL homologation, customs determination, installation approval, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, distributors, and installers should verify current Brazil scope, ordinances, labelling rules, refrigerant quota status, Portuguese-language documentation, voltage configuration, and 60 Hz design suitability with qualified professionals before shipment, sale, or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、认可符合性评定机构决定、INMETRO注册、PROCEL / ENCE标签批准、IBAMA进口许可、ANATEL核准、海关裁定、安装批准或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、经销商和安装方在出货、销售或安装前，应与合格专业人士核实现行巴西适用范围、法规指令、标签规则、制冷剂配额状态、葡萄牙语文件、电压配置及60 Hz设计适配性。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、認可符合性評定機構決定、INMETRO註冊、PROCEL / ENCE標籤批准、IBAMA進口許可、ANATEL核准、海關裁定、安裝批准或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、經銷商和安裝方在出貨、銷售或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行巴西適用範圍、法規指令、標籤規則、制冷劑配額狀態、葡萄牙語文件、電壓配置及60 Hz設計適配性。

answer_first.en: Brazil market entry for Chinese heat pumps is blocked mainly by mandatory INMETRO certification, mandatory PROCEL / ENCE energy labelling before sale, IBAMA refrigerant import licensing and HFC quota controls, ANATEL obligations for wireless modules, and a critical 60 Hz plus 127 V / 220 V redesign gap. China CCC, GB 25454, GB/T 7725, and GB 9237 documentation are useful baselines but are not recognized as Brazil approvals.
answer_first.zh: 中国热泵进入巴西的主要障碍是强制INMETRO认证、销售前强制PROCEL / ENCE能效标签、IBAMA制冷剂进口许可与HFC配额管制、无线模块的ANATEL义务，以及关键的60 Hz和127 V / 220 V重设计差距。中国CCC、GB 25454、GB/T 7725和GB 9237文件可作为基础资料，但不等同于巴西批准。
answer_first.zht: 中國熱泵進入巴西的主要障礙是強制INMETRO認證、銷售前強制PROCEL / ENCE能效標籤、IBAMA制冷劑進口許可與HFC配額管制、無線模組的ANATEL義務，以及關鍵的60 Hz和127 V / 220 V重設計差距。中國CCC、GB 25454、GB/T 7725和GB 9237文件可作為基礎資料，但不等同於巴西批准。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Needs human review before publication-quality use; recheck official Brazilian regulator sources before relying on any row.
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must keep official-source URLs, publisher, access date, verified flag, and informational-only verdict wording; do not mark verified true without human review.
